name: TOOSII-XD ULTRA
description: A powerful, free, open-source WhatsApp bot with 947+ commands. Features AI, Games, Utility, Group Management, Media Tools, Search, Auto-reactions, Anti-ViewOnce, and much more. Built with Baileys & Node.js.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + (e.g. 254712345678)
